infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Caddy uses your location on the course for distances to the green, wind direction relative to your shot, and automatic shot tracking.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Caddy uses the camera to read scorecards and look at your ball's lie.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Caddy can read scorecards and lies from photos in your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Caddy listens when you tap the mic so you can talk to your caddy hands-free on the course.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Caddy uses your location on the course for distances, wind, and automatic shot tracking.

plugins.cameraPermission: Caddy uses the camera to read scorecards and look at your ball's lie.

plugins.microphonePermission: Caddy listens when you tap the mic so you can talk to your caddy hands-free on the course.
